contentPattern.structure: full-bleed background image + centered white heading + paragraph + single centered CTA button

suitableFor: closing call-to-action banners on ad landing pages (e.g. a values quote + REQUEST A CONSULTATION button)
centered heading + text + single CTA over a full-bleed background image
notSuitableFor: top-of-page heroes with a lead form (use hero-ad)
side-by-side image + text info bands (use columns-ad)
